key_facts: `pyproject.toml` force-includes templates, command partials, passive skills, project-map/testing templates, worker prompts, scripts, and the agent-teams engine source/prompts/skills/crates into the wheel.
CI test workflow runs Ruff on `src/` and pytest on Python 3.11, 3.12, and 3.13 using `uv sync --extra test` then `uv run pytest`.
Release workflow triggers on `v*` tags, generates release notes from recent commits, and creates a GitHub release; wheel publishing is not shown in the sampled release workflow.
Devcontainer post-create installs many agent CLIs plus uv and docfx; it is operational setup code and should be kept in sync with supported-agent claims.
Extension and preset catalog files plus their managers under `src/specify_cli/extensions.py` and `src/specify_cli/presets.py` validate schemas, compatibility, safe paths, and installable surfaces.
recommended_atlas_updates: Document force-included bundled assets and the wheel packaging blast radius.
Document CI/test matrix and release trigger behavior.
Document devcontainer setup as convenience, not the only supported local development path.
unknowns: Release packaging sequence beyond GitHub release creation is lightly sampled; verify before changing distribution automation.
